agendaTasks.name: Clean up & appeal MirthPlus Pinterest account
agendaTasks.notes:
Pinterest Account Clean-Up & Appeal

The MirthPlus Pinterest account (@mirthplus) has an ad policy violation blocking all paid ads. Before submitting an appeal, the profile needs to be cleaned up to remove flagged language.

STEP 1 — Fix the bio
Current bio contains 'Pain Relief, Recovery' — flagged therapeutic language under Pinterest's wellness ad policy. Likely contributed to the violation.
Replace with: 'Premium wellness products for active bodies and calm minds. Everyday balance, naturally. mirthplus.com'

STEP 2 — Fix the Instagram handle
The Instagram link shows @plusmirth but should be @mirthplus. Update in profile settings.

STEP 3 — Review pins for policy-triggering copy
Scan created/saved pins for language like 'pain relief', 'CBD', 'hemp', 'recovery' in titles or descriptions. Soften or remove where found.

STEP 4 — Submit the appeal
Go to Pinterest Business Help and submit an ad account appeal. A clean profile improves chances of reinstatement.
IMPORTANT: Even after appeal, Pinterest does NOT allow CBD product advertising. The appeal only restores account standing. Ads can only run on non-CBD wellness SKUs.

AFTER REINSTATEMENT
The account has only 2 followers and 260 monthly views — essentially dormant. Build an organic pinning strategy around wellness lifestyle content (sleep, stress, balance) — not product/ingredient-first messaging.

Profile URL: pinterest.com/mirthplus
